title: Same; trial of suit filed during vacation
doc_html:
§4156.  Same; trial of suit filed during vacation

Should the court be in vacation at the time of filing the suit, the cause shall be fixed for trial in first instance on the first day of the next term of court.
doc_text:
§4156.  Same; trial of suit filed during vacation
Should the court be in vacation at the time of filing the suit, the cause shall be fixed for trial in first instance on the first day of the next term of court.
